title: Command Center module tab accessibility
summary: This feature delivery closes design-audit findings F-01 and F-09 by refactoring DashboardModuleShell module navigation to the WAI-ARIA tabs pattern with roving tabIndex, aria-controls / tabpanel pairing, and manual activation where arrow keys and Home/End move focus only and Enter or Space switch modules. Focus…
